channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in C++ nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 JustVugg/colibri (18023 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: JustVugg

📝 Repository: JustVugg/colibri

📄 Descrizione: Run GLM-5.2 (744B MoE) on a 25GB-RAM consumer machine — pure C, zero deps, experts streamed from disk. Tiny engine, immense model. 🐦

⭐ Stelle: 18023

🍴 Forks: 1729

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-01T12:27:49Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-23T05:07:42Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 Rompass/openc6-bios (286 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Rompass

📝 Repository: Rompass/openc6-bios

📄 Descrizione: An open-source RISC-V firmware platform for ESP32-C6(8MB Flash). Implements a BIOS/Payload architecture with a custom system call interface (ABI), independent LP-Core coprocessor management, and an anti-brick A/B OTA system.

⭐ Stelle: 286

🍴 Forks: 21

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: bios bootloader embedded esp-idf esp32-c6 firmware riscv

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-15T14:02:56Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-13T04:24:58Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 SyscallX-18113/Apkx-Hunter (70 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: SyscallX-18113

📝 Repository: SyscallX-18113/Apkx-Hunter

📄 Descrizione: Apkx-Hunter is an Android Static Analysis Framework written entirely in C with OWASP MASVS scanning with 15 categories and 166 detection patterns for Android security assessments, reverse engineering, malware analysis, bug bounty hunting, and penetration testing. It features ML-based secret scoring, and advanced static security analysis.

⭐ Stelle: 70

🍴 Forks: 8

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: android android-malware android-pentesting android-reverse-engineering android-security android-static-analysis apk-analysis- bug-bounty cybersecurity malware-analysis mobile-security mobile-security-framework mobile-security-testing owasp owasp-masvs penetration-testing

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-11T11:29:57Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-21T15:06:17Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: Zuigetzu

📝 Repository: Zuigetzu/Donut-CustomHost

📄 Descrizione: Advanced OPSEC fork of Donut. Features a Custom in-memory CLR Host, Tail-Jump ETW bypasses, and zero-patch AMSI evasion for stealthy shellcode generation.
